headline: Krispy Kreme Doughnuts To Celebrate 20 Years Of...Xbox?
summary: A doughnut chain is helping Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) celebrate the 20th anniversary of the iconic Xbox gaming console.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: LyondellBasell, Prologis, Royal Dutch Shell And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's offers investors advice on how to play the return to work trend.
	
	Other featured articles discuss overlooked infrastructure picks and how the reopening trade is affecting bank, HVAC and various tech stocks.

headline: Amazon Offers $500,000 Cash, Cars, And Vacations To Vaccinated Workers
Business Of Women's Sports: Viewership Rising But Still Significant Pay Gap
summary: Viewership of many women’s sports leagues is rising, but advertising dollars and wages remain significantly lower than that of men’s sports, a new study found.

headline: Last Week's Notable Insider Buys: Magnolia Oil & Gas, Vertex Pharmaceuticals
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors, especially when markets are near all-time highs.
	
	Some insiders were picking shares last week in the wake of earnings beats.
	
	One oil exploration and production CEO returned to the buy window during the week too.

headline: Ethereum Crosses $3,100 With 14% Rally: At Its Highest Since May
summary: Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) saw another major price uptick reaching levels not seen since the month of its all-time high following a positive change in its fundamentals which attracted investments.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Amazon, Robinhood, Moderna, Tesla And More
summary: Benzinga has examined the prospects for the favorite stocks of many investors over the past week.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Dogepalooza Announces Ticket Prices, NFT Details For The October Dogecoin Fest
summary: Dogepalooza, a festival celebrating the cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE), is scheduled to take place in October. More details were announced Friday by the team exclusively on Benzinga's "Moon or Bust" show.
